title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 160.065 - School information furnished by charter, private or parochial schools, limited liability
text:
160.065.  School information furnished by charter, private or parochial schools, limited liability. — Charter, private and parochial schools shall not be civilly liable for providing to other schools any information required to be provided pursuant to this chapter.
(L. 2000 S.B. 944 § 2)
